reviews.comment:
Una de las mejores estaciones de servicio YPF de la zona con el agregado que es punto del ACA, buena cantidad de surtidores y personal para atender, dispone de Full YPF, lubricentro, baños, acepta todos los medios de pago,  AIRE GRATUITO (excepcional).
El punto negativo, es muy chica, le falta espacio, no hay ni UN lugar para estacionamiento.

(Translated by Google)
One of the best YPF service stations in the area, plus it's an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) location. It has a good number of pumps and staff, a Full YPF station, a lube center, restrooms, accepts all forms of payment, and offers FREE AIR (exceptional).

The downside is that it's very small and lacks space; there's not a single parking spot.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROemJmamhnRRAB
